title: MTR Braille Music
description: Resource pack adding tactile map music to Minecraft’s MTR mod.
body:
MTR Braille Music Resource Pack

This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
It adds an MTR Braille Music to enhance your railway experience in Minecraft.

Features:

The Music that works in the Tactile Map to replace the Default Music is Beethoven's Fur Elise

Designed for Minecraft Java Edition (1.19 - 1.19.4)

Notes:

Requires the Minecraft Transit Railway mod to function

No copyrighted material is included without permission

This is a resource pack and must be loaded in Minecraft’s Resource Pack menu

Rules:

Do not edit the file; if you edit it, it may return to the default music, and it won't play the Hong Kong Music

Original Tactile Map Music:
